name: Draw in the tray
short_description: "Draw in the Tray" is a casual game.
detailed_description: In this game, players slide the mouse to draw black lines and guide various objects onto the target plate to complete level challenges. The game automatically generates physical collision effects based on the lines you draw, making strategic path planning essential for success. Some objects have elasticity, simulating realistic physical interactions for a more immersive experience. Unleash your creativity and strategy to tackle a variety of unique levels!
